basic_details.job_title: UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 144 Anganwadi Worker and Helper Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Office of the District Programme Officer, Mainpuri
basic_details.short_information: The District Programme Officer (Jila Karyakram Adhikari), Mainpuri has released an official notification inviting online applications from eligible women candidates for the recruitment of Anganwadi Karyakartri (Worker) and Anganwadi Sahayika (Helper) posts across 10 Bal Vikas Pariyojnas (Child Development Projects) in Mainpuri district, Uttar Pradesh. This recruitment is conducted as per Government Order No. 1/1092245/2025/3313/58-1-2025(1917687) dated 17.09.2025, through the state-level departmental portal upanganwadibharti.in.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age 18 years Maximum Age 35 years Cut-off Date for Age Calculation 01 July 2026 | The date of birth recorded in the High School certificate/marksheet will be considered valid for age calculation. Category-wise age relaxation, if any, is not mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.details: Only women candidates are eligible to apply for both Karyakartri and Sahayika posts. Candidates must meet the educational qualification and age limit prescribed below. In rural areas, priority is given to candidates residing in the same gram sabha/ward as per the selection priority order (see Selection Process section). | The minimum educational qualification for both Anganwadi Karyakartri and Sahayika posts is Intermediate (12th) or equivalent. The maximum qualification considered for merit preparation is Postgraduate - meaning merit will be prepared taking into account qualifications up to the postgraduate level. | The date of birth recorded in the High School certificate/marksheet will be considered valid for age calculation. Category-wise age relaxation, if any, is not mentioned in the official notification.

selection_process: with a defined priority order applicable in rural areas for candidates residing in the same gram sabha/ward. The official notification specifies the following selection priority flow chart:
Widow Legally divorced / abandoned (parityakta) woman Other BPL woman
Widow Legally divorced / abandoned (parityakta) woman Other APL woman
If no candidate below the poverty line is found in the above priority order

preference within the same priority order will then be given to a woman living above the poverty line. Details of any separate written examination or interview are not mentioned in the official notification.
how_to_apply: Visit the official departmental portal: upanganwadibharti.in.
Fill the online application form carefully and accurately, following the format available on the portal.
Upload self-attested, clean and legible scanned copies of all documents as specified in the online application form.
Review all entered details before final submission.
Submit the application within the prescribed window - from 10 July 2026 to 30 July 2026 (till midnight, 12:00 AM).
Note: No application or document will be accepted offline or by post. Only applications submitted online through upanganwadibharti.in are valid.
important_instructions: Applications must be submitted only through the online portal upanganwadibharti.in; offline or postal applications/documents will not be accepted. If any error, discrepancy, or forged/incorrect data or marks is found in the application, educational records, or supporting documents, the candidature will be cancelled. The number of advertised vacancies may increase or decrease. Detailed vacancy information is also available on the notice boards of the District Magistrate, Chief Development Officer, Sub-District Magistrate, District Programme Officer, Block Development Officer, and Child Development Project Officer, as well as on the official website upanganwadibharti.in.

content_sections.heading: UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
content_sections.text: Admit card date, exam date, and result date are not mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Details: Anganwadi Bharti Mainpuri 2026
content_sections.text: The notification specifies block/project-wise (Pariyojna-wise) vacancies separately for Karyakartri and Sahayika posts, with category-wise reservation (UR, OBC, SC/ST). The complete breakup is given below. Note: As stated in the official notification, the number of vacancies may increase or decrease.

content_sections.heading: UP Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Only women candidates are eligible to apply for both Karyakartri and Sahayika posts. Candidates must meet the educational qualification and age limit prescribed below. In rural areas, priority is given to candidates residing in the same gram sabha/ward as per the selection priority order (see Selection Process section). The minimum educational qualification for both Anganwadi Karyakartri and Sahayika posts is Intermediate (12th) or equivalent. The maximum qualification considered for merit preparation is Postgraduate - meaning merit will be prepared taking into account qualifications up to the postgraduate level. The date of birth recorded in the High School certificate/marksheet will be considered valid for age calculation. Category-wise age relaxation, if any, is not mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection is merit-based, prepared according to educational qualification, with a defined priority order applicable in rural areas for candidates residing in the same gram sabha/ward. The official notification specifies the following selection priority flow chart: Widow Legally divorced / abandoned (parityakta) woman Other BPL woman Widow Legally divorced / abandoned (parityakta) woman Other APL woman If no candidate below the poverty line is found in the above priority order, preference within the same priority order will then be given to a woman living above the poverty line. Details of any separate written examination or interview are not mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: For widow candidates: Death certificate issued by the Gram Panchayat Officer/concerned Nagar Nikay, along with a certified copy of the family register (parivar panjika). For legally divorced/abandoned candidates: A valid legal order issued by the competent court. Residence certificate and caste certificate: Only online, digitally signed certificates issued from the Tehsil level, verifiable online, will be accepted. Income certificate: Issued by the competent authority as per Government Order No. 3959/1-9-11-Raj0-9 dated 30.09.2011 (as amended), verifiable online. Educational qualification certificates/marksheets (High School and above, as applicable). Self-attested, clean and legible scanned copies of all documents mentioned in the online application form.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for UP Anganwadi Bharti Mainpuri 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official departmental portal: upanganwadibharti.in. Fill the online application form carefully and accurately, following the format available on the portal. Upload self-attested, clean and legible scanned copies of all documents as specified in the online application form. Review all entered details before final submission. Submit the application within the prescribed window - from 10 July 2026 to 30 July 2026 (till midnight, 12:00 AM). Note: No application or document will be accepted offline or by post. Only applications submitted online through upanganwadibharti.in are valid.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted only through the online portal upanganwadibharti.in; offline or postal applications/documents will not be accepted. If any error, discrepancy, or forged/incorrect data or marks is found in the application, educational records, or supporting documents, the candidature will be cancelled. The number of advertised vacancies may increase or decrease. Detailed vacancy information is also available on the notice boards of the District Magistrate, Chief Development Officer, Sub-District Magistrate, District Programme Officer, Block Development Officer, and Child Development Project Officer, as well as on the official website upanganwadibharti.in.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in UP Anganwadi Bharti Mainpuri 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 144 vacancies have been notified - 74 for Anganwadi Karyakartri (Worker) and 70 for Anganwadi Sahayika (Helper) — across 10 Bal Vikas Pariyojnas in Mainpuri district.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for Anganwadi Bharti Mainpuri 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process starts on 10 July 2026 and closes on 30 July 2026 at midnight (12:00 AM).

faq.question: Q3. Who can apply for Anganwadi Karyakartri and Sahayika posts?
faq.answer: Only eligible women candidates can apply, subject to meeting the prescribed educational qualification and age limit.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed at least Intermediate (12th) or equivalent. Merit is prepared considering qualifications up to postgraduate level.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Anganwadi Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years and the maximum age is 35 years, calculated as on the cut-off date of 01 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is not mentioned in the official notification.
